category.name: zoo.nursery
category.item: Hi, I'm Tina and I take care of your babies. They grow into adults in my animal nursery. Choose the baby you want to raise from your inventory.

category.name: zoo.nursery.tooltip
category.item: This is where the cub's growing up.

category.name: zoo.nursery.layer
category.item: Before you know it, your little one will be an adult!
Growth Potion reduces breeding time by 50%.
Yippee! This baby has grown up and been moved to your inventory:
Attention: A baby is growing here! If you move the nursery to the inventory, the process will be interrupted. Are you sure you want to move it now?
Attention: A baby is growing here! If you sell the nursery now, the process will be interrupted. Are you sure you want to sell it now?
